findings_list.title: 📖 Wikipedia: Elon Musk
findings_list.description:
Elon Reeve Musk ( / ˈ iː l ɒ n / EE -lon ; born June 28, 1971) is a businessman and former public official known for his leadership of Tesla and SpaceX . Musk has been the wealthiest person in the world since 2025; as of June 2026, [update] Forbes estimates his net worth to be US$834 billion.

**Born:** Elon Reeve Musk ( 1971-06-28 ) June 28, 1971 (age 54) Pretoria , South Africa
